objective: Resolve whether TransitionRecovery is required release-gate coverage or optional overlay under RootTaxonomyV3.

decision.reason: The user explicitly named BullExpansion, BearExpansion, Manipulation, and Consolidation as main classes and asked for other large classes. CrisisStress is source-supported as a required large stress/turbulent root. TransitionRecovery is source-supported and has a prior accepted optional-overlay packet from 004210, but no downstream release action contract currently requires a distinct recovery/turning-point release gate. Optional overlay evidence cannot compensate for missing required roots.
decision.completion_impact: No completion impact. The objective is not achieved even if TransitionRecovery is optional because BullExpansion, BearExpansion, Consolidation, and Manipulation remain below the 95 gate; CrisisStress is the only prior accepted root.

next_action: Acquire direct manipulation inputs and genuinely new signed-direction/range evidence before rerunning unchanged RootTaxonomyV3 gates.
